response.justification: Szabo is a strong general engineer with 20 years of experience and current Staff-level role at Google demonstrating technical leadership. However, the resume lacks any demonstrated experience in experimentation platforms, A/B testing, metrics infrastructure, or data-driven experimentation—core requirements for a Principal role in Growth/Experimentation Systems. While foundational skills are solid, this role requires deep domain expertise that would require significant ramp-up despite his seniority.
strengths: 20 years of production systems experience with proven ability to handle massive scale (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby, millions of mail sends at Meta)
Current Staff Software Engineer at Google demonstrating cutting-edge technical leadership in AI infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong full-stack expertise across required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C++, C#) and multiple platforms
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature flagging systems—central to this role
Lacking evidence of metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, or statistical analysis work required for growth/experimentation engineering
Resume shows deep technical contributions but limited evidence of multi-team, cross-product systemic initiatives typical of Principal roles

key_factors.factor: Strong production systems and scale experience
Current Staff role at Google with AI infrastructure work
